view_menu.reset_proportions_tooltip: Resets the sizes of all panels to a strict default ratio of 50/50. Window placement is preserved.
view_menu.reset_slots_tooltip: You can freely move windows around, and we save it instantly. This button returns each window to its original default location!
view_menu.panels_tooltip: Toggle a switch off and the panel will completely disappear from the layout, freeing up space for the rest.

info.title: Task Title
info.title_placeholder: E.g., Find all users older than 18
info.author: Author
info.duplicate_desc: A task with the exact same title and description already exists in the pool. Please modify them to continue.
info.duplicate_title_count: There are already {{count}} task(s) with this title

solution.empty_placeholder:
Write a query and press "Execute".
You must successfully execute the query to proceed.
solution.limit_exceeded: (Limit exceeded: server returned first {{shown}} of {{total}} rows)

rules.ast_info: AST rules allow you to verify the structure of the SQL query, not just its output. You can require or forbid specific constructs (JOIN, CTE), tables, functions.
rules.order_matters_tooltip: If enabled — after matching data, the order of rows is additionally checked. Mismatching order with correct data = 'data is correct, order is not'.
rules.order_matters_desc: Checked separately from the rules below — right after data match.
rules.ast_rules_desc: Add static checks for the query structure
rules.no_rules: No additional rules. The query will only be checked for data match.

category_info.construct: Checks for basic constructs: JOIN, GROUP BY, subqueries, CTEs, etc.
category_info.object: Checks if a specific table or column is used.
category_info.function: Checks if a specific SQL function is used (e.g., UPPER, SUM).
category_info.select_star: Checks for the use of 'SELECT *'. Often used to forbid bad practices.
category_info.alias: Requires a specific alias (AS) to be used for a table or column.

condition_info.required: The element must be present in the query.
condition_info.forbidden: The use of the element is strictly forbidden.
condition_info.count_min: The element must appear at least the specified number of times.
condition_info.count_max: The element must appear at most the specified number of times.
condition_info.count_exact: The element must appear exactly the specified number of times.

preview.ready_desc: One last step. Review the final task data before it becomes available to other users.
preview.ready_edit_desc: One last step. Review the final task data before changes are applied.
preview.author: Author:

publishSuccess.title: Task published!
publishSuccess.description: Task has been successfully published and is now available to solve.

exitConfirm.title: Cancel editing?
exitConfirm.description: Any unsaved changes to this task will be lost. Are you sure you want to stop editing?

import_tasks.tasks_desc: Import tasks from one or multiple JSON files
import_tasks.title: Import Tasks
import_tasks.drop_zone: Drag and drop JSON file or multiple task files here
import_tasks.wrong_format: Invalid file format. Please upload a valid JSON with tasks.
import_tasks.test_results_info: To add a task, it must pass both tests.
import_tasks.sql_passed_zero_rows: SQL query executed, but returned 0 rows
import_tasks.zero_rows_warning: Warning: Output is empty. The DB might not match the reference. Adding such tasks is discouraged.
import_tasks.rules_check_info: The query must follow its own rules
